'''Clam Clan''' was a [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi youngling]] clan in the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] in the time prior to the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. It was named for the [[Clam/Legends|clam]]. Producing many students over the centuries, the clan was dissolved along with the rest of the Order in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] during the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]].
